GeneralBoatDescription: 2003 Sea Ray 290 Twin Engine Bowrider, a stunning example of a used bowrider that combines elegance with performance. Upgraded Sea Deck on Swim Platform, Fusion Audio, Cockpit Fridge, Twin Tabs, Halone System, Arch Tons of Storage. With an overall length of 29.5 feet, this vessel features a robust fiberglass hull with a Deep Vee shape, ensuring a smooth and stable ride on the water. Powered by Twin Mercury 350 Mag engines, each delivering an impressive 300 horsepower, this boat is equipped for exhilarating adventures. The inboard/outboard configuration and stern drive provide excellent maneuverability, making it perfect for both cruising and watersports. With a total of 611 and 620 hours on the engines, this Sea Ray has been well-maintained and is ready for new memories on the water. The thoughtful design includes ample space for relaxation and enjoyment, making it an ideal choice for family outings or entertaining friends. Experience the thrill of boating with this exceptional Sea Ray 290 Bowrider! No Trailer

GeneralBoatDescription:
1999 33’ Baja Outlaw/SST Just Ceramic Coated and Garage kept

• MerCruiser 502 Magnums (502 MAG HO): Twin’s with Bravo I drives and stainless props

• Approximate Hours: 950 hrs

Enclosed Head: With portable potty and 12V lighting

Sleeping Capacity: 4, with V-berth and salon seating

Cuddy Cabin Features: Salon seating that converts to berth; galley with sink, table, refrigerator, and enclosed head, deck hatches

Custom Shop & SST Package

Cockpit & Interior: Bolster seating, deep bench, pop-up cleats, stunning race-style cabin, overhead stowage, berth cushions; Carbon-look dash, color-matched gauges and bezels, Livorsi instruments, liquid-filled speedo, Livorsi components, Sea Deck Flooring

Entertainment & Systems: Fusion Audio

Hardware & Accessories: Hydraulic steering, dual-ram trim tabs with indicators, switchable thru-hull exhaust, SS rubrail, color-matched swim platform, pop-up cleats and Baja graphics

Includes B&M Triple Axle Trailer: New Hydro Star Electric Over Hydraulic Brake Controller, New Brakes, Bearings, Wheel Seals on all 3 Axles

All for Only $49,999 Call or Text 602.702.5678

GeneralBoatDescription: Introducing the 2007 Crest 2570 III XRS, a stunning 27-foot pontoon boat designed for unforgettable adventures on the water. This used beauty features a robust aluminum hull, ensuring durability and stability while cruising. Powered by a 150 hp Mercury 2-Stroke outboard engine with only 260 hours of use, it promises exhilarating performance and reliability. With a generous seating capacity of 14, this pontoon is perfect for gatherings with family and friends, allowing everyone to enjoy the sun and water together. The thoughtful design ensures ample space for relaxation and entertainment, making it an ideal choice for leisurely outings or fun-filled days on the lake. Experience the joy of boating with the Crest 2570 III XRS, where comfort meets performance, and create lasting memories on the water.

GeneralBoatDescription: 2012 Yamaha Boats 242 Limited S, a remarkable jet boat that perfectly blends performance and comfort. With an overall length of 23.5 feet, this vessel boasts a sleek fiberglass hull designed in a Deep Vee shape, ensuring smooth navigation and stability on the water. Powered by two robust Yamaha inboard engines, each delivering 180 horsepower, this boat promises exhilarating speed and agility, making it ideal for both leisurely cruises and thrilling adventures. The innovative jet drive system enhances maneuverability, allowing for easy handling in various conditions. Designed to accommodate up to 11 passengers, the 242 Limited S offers ample space for friends and family to enjoy memorable outings. This used boat has been well-maintained, ensuring that it is ready for its next adventure. Experience the perfect combination of style, performance, and comfort with the Yamaha 242 Limited S. luxurious features No Wake Trim Assist, Thruster Vectors, Filler Cushions, Full Cover, Cockpit travel cover,wake board tower, am/fm stereo, walk thru transom, Sea Deck Flooring throuout, Duel Batteries, Trim Tabs, tandem axle trailer with spear

GeneralBoatDescription: Introducing the 2007 Formula 240 Bowrider, a stunning example of a used runabout that combines performance and elegance. With an overall length of 24 feet, this boat features a robust fiberglass hull designed in a Deep Vee shape, ensuring smooth navigation and stability on the water. Powered by a MerCruiser 6.2L MPI Bravo III engine, this vessel delivers an impressive 300 horsepower, providing exhilarating speed and agility for all your aquatic adventures. The inboard/outboard configuration with a stern drive enhances maneuverability, making it perfect for both leisurely cruising and spirited outings. Accommodations include a well-appointed head, adding convenience for day trips. Includes Bimini, Halon System, Dual Batteries, Corsa Through Hull Exhaust And Tandum Axle Trailer

GeneralBoatDescription: 2022 Crownline 265 SS Bowrider, a remarkable vessel that perfectly blends style and performance. With an overall length of 26.25 feet, this boat boasts a sleek modified vee hull made from durable fiberglass, ensuring a smooth ride on the water. Powered by a robust 350 hp Mercury 6.2L inboard/outboard engine, Bravo Driver Duel Props, Windless anchor, Porcelain head, Glass Sink, Granite Counter Top, ambient interior lighting, Duel batteries, Battery charger, 7” Garmin Touch Screen. this boat is designed for exhilarating adventures, having only 65 hours of use. The stern drive configuration enhances maneuverability, making it a joy to navigate. Ideal for leisurely outings or thrilling water sports, the Crownline 265 SS offers ample space for relaxation and enjoyment. Its thoughtful design and quality craftsmanship make it a standout choice for boating enthusiasts. Experience the thrill of the open water with this exceptional bowrider, where every journey becomes a memorable adventure.

GeneralBoatDescription: Introducing the stunning 2025 Performance Powerboats P360, a remarkable high-performance catamaran that embodies speed and agility. With an overall length of 36 feet, this vessel is crafted from durable composite materials, ensuring both strength and lightweight performance on the water. Equipped with twin Mercury 500R outboard engines, each delivering an impressive 500 horsepower, the P360 promises exhilarating acceleration and responsiveness, perfect for thrill-seekers. With only 65 hours of use, these engines are ready to deliver unforgettable adventures. Designed for comfort, the P360 accommodates up to six passengers, making it ideal for family outings or gatherings with friends. The sleek lines and modern design of this boat not only enhance its aesthetic appeal but also contribute to its exceptional performance. Experience the perfect blend of luxury and power with the Performance Powerboats P360, where every journey becomes an extraordinary experience.
